summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Pesto Restaurant Web App MongoDB migration. All backend APIs are working correctly (100% success rate), and frontend integration is fully functional. The migration from Supabase to MongoDB has been successful with all core features working as expected.

design_issues.issue: Minor SVG path rendering errors in console for some icons

passed_tests: Backend health check endpoint (/api/health) working correctly
Backend locations API (/api/locations) returns 5 locations from MongoDB
Backend menu items API (/api/menu-items) returns 28 items from MongoDB
Backend featured items API (/api/featured-items) working correctly
Backend individual item lookup (/api/menu-items/{id}) working correctly
Frontend menu catalog page loads and displays MongoDB data
Frontend location selector changes menu items correctly (all 5 locations tested)
Frontend category filtering works (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, Dessert, Beverage, All Items)
Frontend add to cart functionality works
Frontend displays proper menu item data (names, prices, descriptions, images)
MongoDB database properly seeded with locations and menu items
API integration between frontend and backend working correctly
